search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20065` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 src_tos | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal OUTPUT bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (src_bitmap="$src_dscp$" OR src_dscp="$src_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | strcat src_bitmap " (" src_dscp ")" qos_string

`netflow_search_rule_20065` exp_ip="$exp_ip$" nfo_hostname="$nfo_hostname$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 dest_tos | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal OUTPUT bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | lookup `is_local_lookup` exporters_devices_lookup nfo_hostname exp_ip OUTPUT device_group AS exp_group | search exp_group="$exp_group$" (dest_bitmap="$dest_dscp$" OR dest_dscp="$dest_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | strcat dest_bitmap " (" dest_dscp ")" qos_string
| dedup src_tos dest_tos protocol _time | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by qos_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`
| dedup src_tos dest_tos protocol _time | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by qos_string,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

| `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip qos_string _time sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip qos_string sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name qos_string "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename qos_string as "Source Diff. Services" | rename pct as "% of Total"

| `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | bin _time $span_token$ | stats sum(bytes_in) as sumbytes sum(packets_in) as sumpacketsin sum(flow_count) as sumflowcount by nfo_hostname exp_ip qos_string _time sum_by_exp | eval avgbits= sumbytes*8/($span_int$) | stats sum(sumbytes) as TrafficAmount sum(sumpacketsin) as PacketsAmount sum(sumflowcount) as Connections max(avgbits) as MaxTraffic by nfo_hostname exp_ip qos_string sum_by_exp | sort 0 - TrafficAmount | eval AverageSpeed=(TrafficAmount)*8/$range$ | eval PacketsSpeed=(PacketsAmount)/$range$ | eval pct = TrafficAmount*100/sum_by_exp | `commas_formatting(pct, pct, 2)` | `default_preparation_for_comma_formatted_table` | table nfo_hostname exp_ip_name qos_string "Max Mbps" "Average Mbps" "Total Traffic MB" pct "Average Packets/s" "Total Packets" "Total Connections" | rename nfo_hostname as "NFO" | rename exp_ip_name as "Device" | rename qos_string as "Dest. Diff. Services" | rename pct as "% of Total"

chart.title: CBQoS for Device: $DeviceIn$ Source DSCP: $QOSIn$ reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal output bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal output bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | strcat src_bitmap " (" src_dscp ")" qos_string | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$DeviceIn$" qos_string="$QOSIn$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") (src_port="$src_port$" AND dest_port="$dest_port$") (src_bitmap="$src_dscp$" OR src_dscp="$src_dscp$") (dest_bitmap="$dest_dscp$" OR dest_dscp="$dest_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `format_ip_column(dest_ip,dest_ip,dest_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by dest_ip,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

chart.title: CBQoS for Device: $DeviceOut$ Destination DSCP: $QOSOut$ reported by NFO $NFO$

search.query: `netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal output bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal output bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | strcat dest_bitmap " (" dest_dscp ")" qos_string | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$DeviceOut$" qos_string="$QOSOut$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") (src_port="$src_port$" dest_port="$dest_port$") (src_bitmap="$src_dscp$" OR src_dscp="$src_dscp$") (dest_bitmap="$dest_dscp$" OR dest_dscp="$dest_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | `format_ip_column(src_ip,src_ip,src_host)` | `per_second_chart(sum(bytes_in) by src_ip,"$span_token$",$span_int$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos input_snmp output_snmp | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal output bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal output bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | strcat src_bitmap " (" src_dscp ")" qos_string | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$DeviceIn$" qos_string="$QOSIn$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") (src_port="$src_port$" AND dest_port="$dest_port$") (src_bitmap="$src_dscp$" OR src_dscp="$src_dscp$") (dest_bitmap="$dest_dscp$" OR dest_dscp="$dest_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | `conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

`netflow_search_rule_20067` nfo_hostname="$NFO$" | `sampling(bytes_in)` | eventstats sum(bytes_in) as sum_by_exp by exp_ip nfo_hostname | fillnull value=0 src_tos dest_tos input_snmp output_snmp | eval src_decimal=floor((src_tos)/4) | eval dest_decimal=floor((dest_tos)/4) | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS src_decimal output bitmap AS src_bitmap DSCP AS src_dscp | lookup `is_local_lookup` diffserv_lookup decimal AS dest_decimal output bitmap AS dest_bitmap DSCP AS dest_dscp | eval src_bitmap = if(src_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(src_bitmap, "0")) | eval dest_bitmap = if(dest_bitmap = "000000", 0, ltrim(dest_bitmap, "0")) | strcat dest_bitmap " (" dest_dscp ")" qos_string | `get_exporter_name(exp_ip_name)` | search exp_ip_name="$DeviceOut$" qos_string="$QOSOut$" (src_ip="$src_ip$" OR src_host="$src_ip$") (dest_ip="$dest_ip$" OR dest_host="$dest_ip$") (src_port="$src_port$" AND dest_port="$dest_port$") (src_bitmap="$src_dscp$" OR src_dscp="$src_dscp$") (dest_bitmap="$dest_dscp$" OR dest_dscp="$dest_dscp$") | fillnull value="" transport | search transport="$protocol_name$" | `sampling(packets_in)` | `sampling(flow_count)` | `conversation(TrafficAmount,"$span_token$",$span_int$,$range$)`

html.p: You see this message because there is no data for the selected Time Range or the App Setup is not completed.

This dashboard is populated by NetFlow Optimizer (NFO) Logic Module â€ś10065: CBQoS Monitorâ€ť (syslogs with nfc_id=20065). This Module reports traffic for all DSCP bits combinations (QoS). This Module is packaged in NFO â€śNetwork Traffic and Devices Monitorâ€ť Module Set.
Please either change the Time Range or make sure that this NFO Logic Module is enabled. See NSO Configuration for more details.
